hero.title: Image Rotator
hero.tagline: Have you even been annoyed by rotated images? Look no further! Rotate one or more images 90°/180°/270° left or right. Preview the result instantly, then download your rotated image — or zip them all at once. No uploads, no server.

dropzone.text: Drag & drop images here, or click to browse
dropzone.sub: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, AVIF and more

hint.text: Need to resize your image after rotating?

whatIs.heading: What is Image Rotator
whatIs.body: The Image Rotator lets you rotate one or multiple images by 90° increments directly in your browser. All processing is done locally — your files never leave your device.

howWorks.heading: How rotation works
howWorks.body: Each image is drawn to an offscreen canvas with the selected rotation applied. The canvas output is then exported in the original file format, preserving image quality. For 90°, 180° and 270° rotations, the canvas dimensions are automatically adjusted to ensure the output has the correct aspect ratio.

faq.heading: FAQs
faq.q1: Q: Are my images uploaded to a server?
faq.a1: A: No — all rotation happens locally in your browser. Your images are never uploaded.
faq.q2: Q: Can I rotate multiple images at once?
faq.a2: A: Yes — drop multiple images, rotate each independently, then use Download All to get a ZIP.
faq.q3: Q: Is the original image modified?
faq.a3: A: No — the original file is unchanged. You download a new copy with the rotation baked in.

howItWorks.step1: Upload one or more images by drag-and-drop or by browsing your files.
howItWorks.step2: Pick an image from the thumbnail strip and rotate left or right.
howItWorks.step3: Optionally enable Apply All to rotate every image together.
howItWorks.step4: Download the current image or download all rotated images as a ZIP file.

guide.title: Image Rotator – Rotate Images Online Instantly Without Losing Quality
guide.lead: Need to rotate a photo quickly? Our Image Rotator helps you rotate images online in seconds. Upload your image, choose the rotation angle, preview the result, and download instantly.
guide.intro2: Whether you need to fix phone photo orientation, prepare images for social media, or adjust scanned documents, rotating an image should be simple and fast.

why.heading: 🔄 Why Rotate an Image?
why.body: Images are often saved in the wrong orientation depending on the device used to capture them. Rotating helps correct alignment and improves presentation.
why.item2: 🌐 Prepare images for websites or blogs
why.item5: 📊 Adjust visuals for presentations or social media

faq.heading: ❓ Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Does rotating an image reduce quality?
faq.a1: Most modern image rotators preserve quality when rotating standard formats.
faq.q2: Can I rotate images by custom angles?
faq.a2: Some tools allow free-angle rotation beyond fixed 90° turns.
faq.a3: Many browser-based image rotators are completely free to use.
faq.q4: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a4: Most online image rotators do not require registration.

whyUs.heading: ⭐ Why Use ThrjTech Image Rotator?
whyUs.body: Your Image Rotator tool offers a simple workflow focused on speed and ease of use. Instead of opening heavy editing software, users can quickly rotate images online and download the corrected version immediately.

conclusion.body: Fixing image orientation has never been easier. Use ThrjTech Image Rotator to rotate images online instantly — no installs, no sign-up required.
